name: ZOOMLION HEA.I.S.+T.H YC1
summary: ZOOMLION HEA.I.S.+T.H YC1: Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Co., Ltd. is a Chinese manufacturer of engineering and construction machinery. The company produces a wide range of products including mobile cranes, concrete machinery, and earthmoving equipment. Zoomlion is headquartered in Changsha, Hunan, China.
